scripts.build:sidecar: node scripts/copy-sidecar.mjs --ensure-dummy && cd src-tauri && cargo build --release --bin agodesk-worker --features computer-use-sidecar && cd .. && node scripts/copy-sidecar.mjs
scripts.build:win: npm run build && npm run build:sidecar && npm run tauri -- build --bundles nsis --features computer-use-sidecar
scripts.build:linux: npm run build && npm run build:sidecar && npm run tauri -- build --bundles "deb,appimage,rpm" --features computer-use-sidecar
